title: The Chocolate Chase
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo bikes all over town to recover the stolen golden Mousebergé Egg before the Spring Festival opens! 🍫

q.en: What festival is New Mouse City celebrating in this story?
q.zh: 故事里老鼠岛新城正在庆祝什么节日？

options.en: A cheese-tasting fair according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奶酪品尝会（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book opens with New Mouse City's annual Spring Festival, when rodents give one another chocolate eggs.
explain.zh: 故事开头正是老鼠岛新城一年一度的春节庆典，大家互相赠送巧克力蛋。

q.en: What accident happened to Geronimo on the office roof?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在报社楼顶上发生了什么意外？

options.en: He stepped on a rake, hit his snout, and fell into fertilizer
options.zh: 他踩到耙子，撞到鼻子，还掉进了肥料里

options.en: He was chased by a cat according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他被一只猫追赶（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Geronimo stepped on the end of a rake, the handle hit his snout, and he fell tail-first into smelly fertilizer.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩踩到耙子的一端，耙柄撞中他的鼻子，他屁股朝天掉进了臭烘烘的肥料里。

q.en: What is the famous Mousebergé Egg made of?
q.zh: 著名的鼠伯格彩蛋是用什么做成的？

options.en: Solid gold decorated with rubies, sapphires, and emeralds
options.zh: 实心黄金，并镶嵌红宝石、蓝宝石和绿宝石

options.en: A hollow plastic shell according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 空心的塑料壳（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Mousebergé crafted the egg from solid gold and decorated it with rubies, sapphires, and emeralds.
explain.zh: 鼠伯格用实心黄金打造了彩蛋，并镶嵌了红宝石、蓝宝石和绿宝石。

q.en: How did the thief cut a hole through the unbreakable display case?
q.zh: 小偷是如何在打不破的展示柜上切出洞的？

options.en: With a magic spell according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用魔法咒语（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The director said only a very pure diamond could even scratch the special unbreakable material.
explain.zh: 馆长说只有极纯的钻石才能划伤那种特殊的防碎材料。

q.en: What clue did Geronimo find caught at the base of the stand?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在展台底座发现了什么线索？

options.en: A red rubber ball according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一个红色橡皮球（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: After bumping the case, Geronimo held up a long blond hair caught at the base of the stand.
explain.zh: 撞到展柜后，杰罗尼摩举起了卡在展台底座的一根长长金发。

q.en: At the jewelry store, what did the dark-haired mouselet do?
q.zh: 在珠宝店里，那个深色头发的女鼠做了什么？

options.en: Returned a lost wallet according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 归还了一个丢失的钱包（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Swapped the real diamond ring for ordinary glass
options.zh: 把真正的钻石戒指换成了普通的玻璃

explain.en: Mousieur von Gold found the box held ordinary glass; the mouselet had swapped the real diamond.
explain.zh: 冯金先生发现盒子里只剩普通玻璃，那位女鼠把真钻石调了包。

q.en: How did the thieves make the museum guard sleep through the heist?
q.zh: 盗贼是如何让博物馆守卫在案发时睡着的？

options.en: They turned off the lights according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他们关掉了灯（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）
他们播放了吵闹的音乐

options.en: A red-haired mouselet gave him a cheesy milkshake with a sleeping pill
options.zh: 一位红发女鼠给了他一杯掺了安眠药的奶酪奶昔

explain.en: The guard remembered a red-haired mouselet from the food stand gave him a cheesy milkshake that made him pass out.
explain.zh: 守卫记得对面小吃摊一位红发女鼠给了他一杯奶酪奶昔，让他昏睡过去。

q.en: Who was the thief behind all the different disguises?
q.zh: 所有不同伪装背后的小偷到底是谁？

options.en: Shadow, the smartest thief in all of Mouse Island
options.zh: 影子，全老鼠岛最聪明的盗贼

options.en: Geronimo's cousin Trap according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩的表哥特拉普（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo recognized the thief in the blue container as Shadow; the blond, dark-haired, red-haired, and ratlet disguises were all her.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩认出蓝色集装箱里的盗贼正是影子；金发、深发、红发和提公文包的老鼠全是她的伪装。

q.en: Why did Shadow want to ruin the Spring Festival?
q.zh: 影子为什么要毁掉春节庆典？

options.en: She wanted to win the baking contest according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她想赢得烘焙比赛（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: No one ever gave her a chocolate egg, so she thought it was unfair
options.zh: 从没有人送过她巧克力蛋，她觉得很不公平

options.en: She did not like the color yellow

explain.en: Shadow said the Spring Festival was a silly tradition because no one ever gave her a chocolate egg, so she wanted no one to enjoy it.
explain.zh: 影子说春节是个傻乎乎的传统，因为从没人送她巧克力蛋，所以她想让大家也过不成。

q.en: How did Geronimo get the Mousebergé Egg back?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是如何把鼠伯格彩蛋找回来的？

options.en: Hercule found it in a trash can according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 赫拉克在垃圾桶里找到了它（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He gave Shadow Trap's chocolate egg and she returned the golden egg
options.zh: 他把自己给影子特拉普做的巧克力蛋，影子便归还了金蛋

options.en: He fought her with a sword

explain.en: Geronimo handed Shadow Trap's chocolate egg and convinced her to return the Mousebergé Egg, which she left on the dock.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩把特拉普做的巧克力蛋送给影子，说服她归还鼠伯格彩蛋，她把金蛋留在了码头上。
